stories.title: E2E deploy verification harness (Sprint 3 P0 DoD §5 carry + RCA-15 service persistence)
depends_on: Issue #175 (RCA-15 owner pre-req must be applied first) — APPLIED 2026-06-20T19:55Z ✅
Issue #189 (RCA-16 v9 systemd ExecStart fail, surfaced by T6 RED in PR #190 test plan) — open
scope_includes: Test harness: run 3+ consecutive auto-deploys, verify service alive 5+ min after each (AC1+AC3)
Service persistence test: ss -tlnp 'sport = :8000' shows uvicorn alive post-deploy (AC2)
systemctl --user is-active atilcalc-web.service returns 'active' between deploys (AC4) — GAP SURFACED IN PR #190 (T3 RED), see implementation_gaps
Owner apply pre-req: loginctl enable-linger atilcan + unit file at ~/.config/systemd/user/ (DONE 2026-06-20)
scripts/tests/d019-e2e-deploy-verify.sh (regression test for the harness) — IN MAIN via PR #190 (4/6 TCs GREEN: T1, T2, T4, T5; 2 RED: T3, T6)
/healthz returns 200 OK after each deploy (AC5) — GREEN in d019 T4
d014+d015+d016+d017+d018 regression all still PASS after v9 path (AC7)

implementation_gaps_surfaced_in_pr190.title: AC4 systemctl --user is-active check missing in deploy-runner.sh step 4
implementation_gaps_surfaced_in_pr190.fix_size: ~5 lines (add `systemctl --user is-active atilcalc-web.service` to step 4 of deploy-runner.sh)

implementation_gaps_surfaced_in_pr190.title: RCA-16 v9 systemd ExecStart fail — user-context fix needed
implementation_gaps_surfaced_in_pr190.fix_owner: developer + architect (architect reviews User=atilcan vs sudo -u atilcan vs XDG_RUNTIME_DIR env choice)
implementation_gaps_surfaced_in_pr190.fix_size: ~10-20 lines + ADR amendment if User=atilcan is the chosen path (likely ADR-0010 amend)
implementation_gaps_surfaced_in_pr190.blocks_story: First v9 deploy needs to exit 0; user-context is the most likely RCA-16 root cause per PR #190 adversarial probes

stories.title: #125 auto-revert bug fix (architect RC + dev impl + tester sign-off)
depends_on: Architect RC (root cause identification) — Sprint 4 P1 day 1
blocks: All PRs using cc:* label flips (Sprint 4+ every PR has cc:* on it)
scope_includes: Identify the auto-revert mechanism (per Issue #125 hypothesis: orchestrator auto-hygiene watcher, CI label-check, architect watcher, or PM watcher)
Fix the auto-revert bug (cache update, watcher disable, or audit trail per Issue #125 options a/b/c)
Regression test: 3 PRs in a row do not experience cc:* auto-revert within 90s
Update CLAUDE.md §Handoff Discipline if doctrine needs amendment
